dataset: Zotero reference library (seeded with ML papers)

pi_items.source: Task setup script (setup_task.sh) creates this collection in Zotero database
Task specification and export verification script (export_result.sh) checks for this tag
RIS is standard export format for Zotero; path verified as valid Linux path in Zotero user home directory
Verified as real paper published at NeurIPS 2017 by Vaswani, Shazeer, Parmar, Uszkoreit et al. (arXiv:1706.03762, https://papers.nips.cc/paper/7181-attention-is-all-you-need)

pi_items.metadata_value: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
pi_items.verified_value: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
pi_items.source: Verified as real paper published at NAACL-HLT 2019 by Devlin, Chang, Lee, Toutanova (arXiv:1810.04805, https://aclanthology.org/N19-1423/)
Verified as real paper published at NeurIPS 2020 by Brown, Mann, Ryder et al. (arXiv:2005.14165, https://papers.nips.cc/paper/2020/hash/1457c0d6bfcb4967418bfb8ac142f64a-Abstract.html)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Zotero reference library seeded with three real, highly-cited machine learning papers: 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., NeurIPS 2017), 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding' (Devlin et al., NAACL-HLT 2019), and 'Language Models are Few-Shot Learners' (Brown et al., NeurIPS 2020). The task creates a synthetic collection named 'NeurIPS 2023 Draft' containing these papers and requires the user to tag them with 'submitted-2023' and export to an RIS file at /home/ga/Documents/neurips_archive.ris. All metadata values are accurate.
